title: boehmeria frutescens var. viridula
intro: Boehmeria frutescens var. viridula, also known as Chinese Polygonum or Dilly, is a type of perennial plant in the nettle family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Boehmeria frutescens var. viridula include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
